title: Cybersecurity Programme Management Specialist
description:
Key Responsibilities:

Data Analysis, Data-Driven Reporting and Strategic Insights

- Track the key performance indicators (KPIs) and benchmarks of all programme workstreams.

-Design and develop comprehensive dashboards using visualization tools to support data-driven decision making

- Perform complex, in-depth data analysis to generate clear, actionable insights, reports and visualisations (e.g. Tableau, Excel, Power BI) for management

- Provide data-driven recommendations to the respective workstream leads for strategic decision making

- Ensure data quality and accuracy in all reporting

- Implement and maintain data validation processes in all reporting

- Establish and maintain best practices for reporting

- Create and maintain documentation for dashboards and reports created

- Propose and implement automation wherever applicable

- Provide training and guidance on reporting and dashboard usage

Program Management:

- Support the execution of all programme workstreams, serving as the main point of contact for stakeholders.

- Collaborate with stakeholders to understand reporting requirements and metrics

- Present insights and findings to stakeholders

Requirements:

- A Bachelor’s degree in Data Analytics, Business Analytics, or a related field is required.

- A minimum of 3-5 years of proven experience in programme management is essential.

- 2-4 years of hands-on experience in data analytics required

- Proven track record with visualisation tools (e.g. Tableau, MS Excel, Power BI)

- Familiarity with statistical analysis

- Understanding of data quality frameworks

- Preferably have some experience with security metrics and KPIs

- Good stakeholder management and communication skills with a demonstrated ability to collaborate with leaders and employees at all levels.

- Exceptional analytical mindset with the ability to translate complex data into compelling visual stories and strategic insights.

Required Skills

- High proficiency in data analysis and visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, MS Excel).

- Experience with a programming language for data analysis, such as SQL, Python, is highly desirable/preferred.

- A professional certification in data analytics (e.g. Tableau, Power BI) would be a distinct advantage.


Job Locations: Punggol/ Buona Vista/ Hybrid
Working hours: Monday to Friday 8.30am to 5.30pm
Contract: 1 year (Immediate to 01 December 2026)
Salary: $7460 to $11940

EA License No: 96C4864
Reg. No.: R24121728 EUNICE WOO JING QI
